query: hey, I'm building a new internal tool for the ops team to track vendor onboarding tickets. need to get it stood up on our railway setup with okta login. starting from scratch
ok so legal needs a small dashboard to view contract expirations from notion. zero to production - what's the playbook for unicore?
Sasha asked me to spin up a quick app for the finance team to query the warehouse — needs to be on railway under unicore-tools.io. where do I start?
I want to take this empty repo from zero to production on railway. it's gonna be the new approval workflow tool for HR
starting a brand new vibe-coded project for the recruiting team. should I just `gh repo create` or is there a setup flow?
set up a new service for Railway
I need to build a tiny tool that lets PMs file headcount requests. will live behind okta and run on railway like our other internal stuff. walk me through it
ok roman said I should use this repo's skills to bootstrap a new service. it's an internal admin panel for the marketing ops team. what's the order of operations?
I'm a PM and I want to build my own tool that pulls from the analytics warehouse and lets me approve campaign budgets. total greenfield. heard we have a railway setup at universe
create a new internal unicore tool
add tRPC to my existing project — Next.js + prisma already wired up but no api layer yet
I just got a new mac, gotta install everything to start working — node, docker, gh, what else for the unicore stack?
deploy my existing nextjs app to railway, it's already built and tested locally. just need the railway side
set up okta sso for our customer-facing marketing site at marketing.universe.tech
I'm starting a new open source CLI tool in Go, what's the recommended layout?
I need to add a /api/health endpoint to our existing service that pings prisma and okta — only that, don't touch anything else
we want to migrate our existing service from Vercel to Railway, it's already in production
create a new GitHub repo for the design team's icon library. just an npm package, no backend
I want to add prisma to my side project that uses sqlite right now. nothing fancy, weekend project
trying to debug why our existing railway deployment is OOM-ing on staging. nothing to do with bootstrapping
